phoneticUs: ﾋ埤roﾊ閣ﾉ厖稽iﾋ刃; ﾋ埤roﾊ閣ﾉ冦ﾉｪn
examples: The extraction process of nucleoprotein and protamine from freshwater fish spermary was studied.
Objective: To study the expression of the mammalian P1 protamine gene in rat and mouse.
While protamine inhibit or kill bacteria, bacteria are induced a variety of mechanisms to resist it.
So doctors must turn it off with another drug, called protamine.
Neutralase, an enzyme that chews up heparin, could replace protamine.
